gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Peirce approved the storage result reader validation with no actionable findings after verifying focused tests, release evidence tests, storage benchmark tests, full suite, diff check, and poetry check.
verification: git diff --check && poetry run pytest -q && poetry check && poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> 1228 passed; poetry check All set
what_changed: Rejected duplicate, empty, and unsupported storage benchmark result reader IDs in strict release evidence validation.
Added regression coverage for ambiguous storage result rows while preserving the storage benchmark output schema.
why: Strict V1 release evidence should prove Memory, Disk, and Unity Catalog result rows directly, not just rely on top-level reader summaries when raw results contain duplicates or unexpected readers.
